entry.title: What the Fire Took
entry.summary:
Author: 79KJ01

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 37,834Chapters: 16/22Kudos: 6

Summary: After the fire that changed everything, Buck and Eddie learn that saving each other is the easiest part. Living with what it means is harder. In a city built on sirens and smoke, denial burns slower—but longer—than flame.

entry.title: Between Two Lungs
entry.summary:
Author: noLongerhumannn

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,654Chapters: 3/10Kudos: 78

Summary: Evan "Buck" Buckley is 35 years old when he decides to settle down in Los Angeles for a job offer.Eddie Diaz is 27 years old when he agrees to help Maddie Buckley's 'little' brother move into his new home.Eddie discovers what it means to love someone the second his breath gets caught on Buck's blue eyes.

entry.title: The sins we think we carry
entry.summary:
Author: Ilbu9k

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,176Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 15

Summary: The guilt of losing Bobby is a feeling all too well to the 118 completely, everyone has secrets and wrong doing's they have committed in the past but what happens when it all comes back to haunt them. Especially for Evan Buckley and Eddie Diaz, lost secrets admitted down to one person, one stranger who changed their lives forever. A call where the 118 are held hostage, forced to fess up their deepest darkest truth's, at what cost?Or The 118 are held hostage and have to confess to their sins. ~~ “You know what, you know Edmundo.” Griffin whispers so close that Eddie can see every pore on his worthless face. “I love someone, more than I should.” He says making eye contact with Buck, Griffin laughs finally moving away from him, Eddie starts staring at the ground. “And I can’t tell them because then it’s real. Then I have to admit it to everyone and I know my parents disapprove.” Griffin smiles, turning to Buck. “Get up.” He yells and Eddie snaps his head up as Griffin presses the gun against the side of Buck’s head. Buck staring into Eddie’s eyes, frowning but the slightest glint in his eyes still appears, the happiness and joy that makes Buck, Buck. “Tell him, Eddie. Tell him.”

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: you owe me a debt, you stole him from me
entry.summary:
Author: opspsychic81

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,672Chapters: 1/4Kudos: 8

Summary: Buck is tired. Incredibly so. No one at the 118 wants anything to do with him since he dropped the stupid lawsuit. The pain is too much. Knowing the burden he had unravelled onto them, almost costing them all their jobs, is a guilt like no other. He decides to fix the way he’s feeling, and believes the one way to do so is to not be here anymore. — Buck does something really stupid whilst his mental health is at an all time low. His texts to the wrong diaz may have just saved his life, and opened it to a new journey of forgiveness and healing.

entry.summary:
Author: Ria_2010

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 800Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 1

Summary: What if Buck did travel through Texas, specifically to El Paso? I won't use any timeline or years here however since Eddie is older than Buck (from my research) Eddie will be 20 here and Buck will be 18.orThe Buddie former lovers turned each others worst breakup/heartbreak nobody asked for.

entry.title: Bidding Wars.
entry.summary:
Author: BuckleyLover611

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,404Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 35

Summary: “Are you sure you're not going to get murdered?” Buck blinks at him. “Maddie wouldn't set me up with a murderer, Ravi.” he answers blankly. “Maddie doesn't know them, though.” Harry argues back, and Eddie has to take a second to calm down and not spiral in the middle of the locker room at his job.   |Or| Eddie spends $9,600.60 for a date with a Buck and kind of spirals in the aftermath.

entry.title: Through The Dark
entry.summary:
Author: zeinab1d

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,210Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 35

Summary: Set between S8 & S9. Buck hasn't moved out of Eddie's house yet while Eddie has moved back in. They agree to take turns sleeping on the couch/ bed until night terrors gets the best of them. Fic starts smack dab in the middle of the blue of Buck's interrupted sleep.

entry.summary:

entry.title: Continuous Monitoring
entry.summary:
Author: sassay

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,946Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 106

Summary: "Did you need a ride or…" Alex asks. Eddie glances up at her from his phone where he had been texting Chris and shakes his head, "Nah, I'm good. Buck's here." "That's nice of your co-worker to do that." "Buck's not my co-worker. Well he is technically but he's not just my co-worker, you know?" Eddie half shrugs. "Ready to go Eds?" Buck announces and holds up the bag of medication and wound care equipment. Eddie grins at him, "Sure am." Alex looks between the pair amused and mutters under her breath, "Oh I think I know exactly what he is." Missing Scene/Semi Coda Fic for Season 9 Episode 11: Going Once Going Twice Harry didn't tell Buck that Eddie was in hospital - Buck knew because he's been checking the Find My Friends app constantly since Chris didn't get off the bus. What will Eddie's reaction be when he finds out this tidbit of information?

entry.title: I Only Feel Alive Inside the Flame
entry.summary:
Author: untoldchaos

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,063Chapters: 1/8Kudos: 3

Summary: Bobby is dead.Buck is left reeling in the wake of the loss.He's been having nightmares every night, but those dreams begin to change, morphing into a vivid labyrinth of 'what ifs'.When the dreams start to feel like a new reality, the waking world starts to look less appealing, causing Buck to wonder- would it be better if he didn't wake up? A coda-esque Buck crashout fic taking place in the months between s8 and s9Title from 'Flames' by Will Swinton (a very good and fitting song, might I add)

entry.title: Does Love Fade Like Scars?
entry.summary:
Author: thatsanovelidea

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 80,381Chapters: 16/18Kudos: 253

Summary: He realizes it right before everything goes to shit. He’s just standing there in the loft and Eddie’s handing him Christopher’s backpack and talking about “he’s not that fast” and “order pizza” and Buck sort of stares at him—partly in shock, partly in reverence—and he thinks "I love you." He shoves it down immediately, of course, as far down as it’ll go, but the fact of the matter is, it’s there somewhere, floating around inside of him. He can’t get rid of it now. Not that it matters all that much, though, because there’s the whole quitting thing and the lawsuit thing and the argument in the grocery store and by the time he’s given his (re)start date he know; he well and truly fucked up.  or: another classic post-lawsuit fic. Angst, hurt, some comfort, more angst, more comfort.

entry.title: Leaving and Growing Up
entry.summary:
Author: ratking_withnotail

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 241,947Chapters: 19/29Kudos: 1,048

Summary: Percy Jackson was excited—genuinely excited—for the first time in what felt like years. A new city. A new name. A new face, even. The golden hair, the pale blue eyes, the tattoos that traced his skin like constellations—none of it screamed “Percy Jackson” anymore. He was Evan Buckley now, or just Buck, depending on who asked. He’d keep busy—physically exhausted, mentally occupied, emotionally detached. That was the key. No attachments. No friendships. No relationships. No vulnerability. He’d learned the hard way that getting close to people only ended in pain. Either they died, betrayed him, or saw the legend behind the name and stopped seeing him altogether. Unfortunately, he hadn’t planned on the 118.

entry.title: Every smile (for the one that holds your hand)
entry.summary:
Author: BekahRose

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,130Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 39

Summary: "And how does Hen feel about you serving her cat food under the guise of health advice?"Buck chuckles and shakes his head, and Eddie knows how it went down, because when Hen had arrived earlier in the day, she'd made sure the coast was clear before unleashing on Eddie (and Chris, much to the teenager's delight), a tirade of epic proportions about how Buck had lost his mind and needed to be stopped.

entry.title: A Fair Exchange
entry.summary:
Author: chucks_prophet

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,101Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 67

Summary: His fatal mistake in doing this is now everyone’s eyes are on him, including Buck’s. The spotlight is still on his best friend, so his baby blues are like headlights beaming straight at Eddie. And the worst part is, he has no explanation as to why he did it. or the one where Eddie bids on Buck at the auction

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
